news.t: Armada ETF Advisors and Arialgo Ltd Announce Merger Plans, Establishing Technology-Guided REIT Asset Manager
Armada ETF Advisors Announces Phil Bak as CEO
Haus Makes Homeownership Available for $1,000 a Month
Haus Launches Home Equity Security Token $HAUS, Laying the Groundwork For a Completely New Marketplace Backed by the World's Largest Asset Class
Armada ETF Advisors, LLC Launches the Home Appreciation U.S. REIT ETF (NYSE: HAUS), the First Active, Pure-Play U.S. Residential Real Estate ETF

holdings.infoBox: HAUS is an equity ETF with a total of 22 individual holdings. The top holdings are Diversified Healthcare Trust stock at 7.32%, Public Storage at 5.09%, Welltower at 5.07%, Essex Property Trust at 5.02%, and Ventas at 4.93%.

overview.description: The Residential REIT ETF (HAUS) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in real estate equity. The fund provides exposure to publicly traded REITS that derive a substantial amount of their revenue from US residential properties. The fund is actively managed. HAUS was launched on Feb 28, 2022 and is issued by Tidal.

data.title: Armada ETF Advisors Announces Phil Bak as CEO
data.text: NEW YORK--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Armada ETF Advisors announces the appointment of Phil Bak as Chief Executive Officer, after serving as Advisory Board Chairman since November 2021. In his new role, Bak will...

data.title: Haus Makes Homeownership Available for $1,000 a Month
data.text: SAN FRANCISCO--(BUSINESS WIRE)---- $HAUS #blockchain--Haus offers a first in Fintech, flat fee homeownership powered by blockchain, payments as low as $1,000 a month.
